## Page 191

Image /page/190/Picture/5 description: The image features the logo of EDP Renewables. The logo consists of the lowercase letters "edp" in a rounded, sans-serif font, stacked above the word "Renewables" in a smaller, sans-serif font. The color of the text is a dark gray or blue-gray, and the background is white.

## Page 191

Annual Report 2023 Annex II: Taxonomy Alignment. KPIs under Article 8º of EU Taxonomy

## Page 191

Regarding to human capital EDP has internal policies and procedures that seek to promote equality and non -discrimination, the recruitment and retention of talent and the reconciliation of work and personal life. In addition, for each country in which the Company operates, it has systems in place to ensure compliance with regulations regarding
collective bargaining agreements and workers' rights. Please refer to the Human Capital section and also to GRI Reporting for more information.

## Page 191

6 Suppliers In the Index GRI Reporting, 3.4.2 Respect human and labour rights, 4.6
Management and 4.14 Ethics and compliance of the Consolidated Management Report 2023, the Company includes more details about how EDPR is addressing the compliance with article 18 º of the EU Taxonomy for not being involved with violations of the UN Global Compact Principles, as well as the implementation of processes to monitor compliance with the ILO core labour norms, fair competition practices and fiscal transparency and the associated indicators such as reporting cases or fines occurred related to those issues.

## Page 191

Finally, the Social Capital section in the Management Report acts as an index to all the human and labour rights protection practices that the Company has in place.

## Page 192

# Annual Report 2023 Annex II: Taxonomy Alignment. KPIs under Article 8º of EU Taxonomy
